name: fetch
description:
Fetch detailed information about a specific organization, project, or branch using the ID returned by the `search` tool.

<notice>
Notice: The MCP server is currently configured with read-only permissions. All write-access tools have been removed. All remaining tools are limited to read-only operations (for example, read-only SQL queries). Do not try to work around this restriction; it is intentional. If the user requests changes to Neon resources, inform them about the read-only configuration. The user can remove read-only mode by removing the readonly query param from the MCP server URL, or by logging out and back in with OAuth and selecting full access.
</notice>

id.description: The ID returned by the search tool to fetch detailed information about the entity
